parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: '03_control_agent', event_type: 'CONTROL_ACTION_DISPATCHED', thing_id: $json.control_command.thing_id, action: $json.control_command.command, risk_score: $json.risk_analysis?.risk_score || 0, trigger: ($json.control_command.reason || []).join(','), details: $json.control_command, timestamp: $json.control_command.issued_at }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO control_command_log (command_id, correlation_id, thing_id, command, requested_by, source_agent, reason, risk_score, status, created_at, metadata) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, COALESCE($10::timestamptz, NOW()), $11::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (command_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, metadata = control_command_log.metadata || EXCLUDED.metadata;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.control_command.command_id, $json.control_command.correlation_id, $json.control_command.thing_id, $json.control_command.command || 'UNKNOWN', $json.control_command.requested_by || $json.control_command.source_agent, $json.control_command.source_agent, ($json.control_command.reason || []).join(','), Number($json.control_command.risk_score || 0), $json.control_command.status, $json.control_command.issued_at, JSON.stringify({ rejection_reasons: $json.control_command.rejection_reasons || [], writes: ($json.control_command.writes || []).map(function(w){ return { path: w.path }; }), label: $json.control_command.label, priority: $json.control_command.priority, validated_at: $json.control_command.validated_at }) ] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: '03_control_agent', event_type: 'CONTROL_COMMAND_REJECTED', status: 'REJECTED', thing_id: $json.control_command.thing_id, action: $json.control_command.command || 'UNKNOWN', risk_score: $json.control_command.risk_score || 0, trigger: ($json.control_command.reason || []).join(','), error_message: ($json.control_command.rejection_reasons || []).join(','), correlation_id: $json.control_command.correlation_id, details: $json.control_command, timestamp: $json.control_command.issued_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: '03_control_agent', event_type: 'CONTROL_WRITE_SUCCEEDED', thing_id: $json.thing_id, action: $json.command_name, details: { path: $json.path, value: $json.value, label: $json.command_label }, timestamp: $json.issued_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: '03_control_agent', event_type: 'CONTROL_WRITE_FAILED', thing_id: $json.thing_id, action: $json.command_name, details: { path: $json.path, value: $json.value, failed_at: $json.failed_at }, timestamp: $json.issued_at }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...input, dead_letter: true, failed_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
